---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for ForgeHelm
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to [...] because [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the scenario where this feature would be useful:

1. User wants to...
2. User clicks...
3. The extension...

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references to similar features in other tools.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues to make sure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with ForgeHelm's scope (bulk GitHub repo management)
